reasoning: Functional higher-current alternative to the obsolete onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G. Microchip MIC29150-12WU is a 1.5 A high-current LDO (50% more current than NCP1117's 1.0 A) in TO-263-3 (3-pin D2PAK). NOT pin-compatible (TO-263 vs SOT-223) — PCB redesign required. Same low-dropout topology and 3-terminal LDO architecture. Use when the application needs >1.0 A and can accommodate the larger TO-263 thermal footprint. Note: 12 V fixed output; for 2.5 V fixed order MIC29150-2.5WU.

replacementCandidates.description: 1.5 A high-current low-dropout voltage regulator, fixed 12 V, TO-263. Functional alternative to onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G (higher current, larger package).
fitNotes: Functional higher-current alternative to the obsolete onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G. Microchip MIC29150-12WU is a 1.5 A high-current LDO (50% more current than NCP1117's 1.0 A) in TO-263-3 (3-pin D2PAK). NOT pin-compatible (TO-263 vs SOT-223) — PCB redesign required. Same low-dropout topology and 3-terminal LDO architecture. Use when the application needs >1.0 A and can accommodate the larger TO-263 thermal footprint. Note: 12 V fixed output; for 2.5 V fixed order MIC29150-2.5WU.
replacementCandidates.productOverview: MIC29150-12WU is Microchip Technology's 1.5 A high-current low-dropout regulator in TO-263-3 (3-pin tab package). MIC2915x family provides 1.5 A output current at 12 V fixed (also available 3.3 V, 5.0 V, 7.5 V, adjustable), 350 mV typical dropout at 1.5 A, ±1% output tolerance. Functional alternative to onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G (1.0 A, 2.5 V fixed, SOT-223) where the 1.5x current capacity and TO-263 thermal performance are acceptable. Same low-dropout topology and 3-terminal LDO architecture. NOT pin-compatible (TO-263-3 vs SOT-223) — verify footprint and PCB layout.
replacementCandidates.reason: Functional higher-current alternative to the obsolete onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G. Microchip MIC29150-12WU is a 1.5 A high-current LDO (50% more current than NCP1117's 1.0 A) in TO-263-3 (3-pin D2PAK). NOT pin-compatible (TO-263 vs SOT-223) — PCB redesign required. Same low-dropout topology and 3-terminal LDO architecture. Use when the application needs >1.0 A and can accommodate the larger TO-263 thermal footprint. Note: 12 V fixed output; for 2.5 V fixed order MIC29150-2.5WU.

replacementCandidates.description: 1.0 A low-dropout positive fixed 2.5 V voltage regulator, SOT-223. Enhanced 1117-family alternative with tighter ±1% output tolerance.
fitNotes: Functional enhanced alternative to the obsolete onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G. Diodes AZ1117-25 is the 1117 family with ±1% tolerance and -40 C to +125 C industrial temperature range, in the same SOT-223 footprint (pin 1=Adj/GND, pin 2=Vout, pin 3=Vin, tab=Vin). Better load regulation and wider operating temperature than NCP1117. Same LDO topology and 3-terminal architecture. Use as drop-in for 1.0 A LDO designs that need tighter voltage accuracy than NCP1117's ±1% provides.
replacementCandidates.productOverview: AZ1117-25 is Diodes Incorporated's 1.0 A low-dropout positive fixed 2.5 V voltage regulator in SOT-223 (enhanced 1117 family). Maximum dropout 1.3 V at 1.0 A, 15 V max input, ±1% output tolerance. Same SOT-223 1117-family pinout (pin 1=Adj/GND, pin 2=Vout, pin 3=Vin, tab=Vin). Tighter tolerance and better load regulation than onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G (±1% vs ±1%) — functional alternative with improved accuracy. Direct drop-in for 1.0 A LDO applications migrating from NCP1117 family after onsemi's 1Q2021 PDN (Last Ship 2025-04-08).
replacementCandidates.reason: Functional enhanced alternative to the obsolete onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G. Diodes AZ1117-25 is the 1117 family with ±1% tolerance and -40 C to +125 C industrial temperature range, in the same SOT-223 footprint (pin 1=Adj/GND, pin 2=Vout, pin 3=Vin, tab=Vin). Better load regulation and wider operating temperature than NCP1117. Same LDO topology and 3-terminal architecture. Use as drop-in for 1.0 A LDO designs that need tighter voltage accuracy than NCP1117's ±1% provides.

replacementCandidates.description: 1.0 A low-dropout positive fixed 2.5 V voltage regulator, SOT-223. Industry-standard 1117 family pinout, P2P with onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G.
fitNotes: Footprint- and pin-function-compatible P2P replacement for the onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G from Advanced Monolithic Systems. AMS1117-2.5 is the original 1117 family in SOT-223 with identical pinout (pin 1=Adj/GND, pin 2=Vout, pin 3=Vin, tab=Vin), 1.3 V max dropout at 1.0 A. Per AMS datasheet, the AMS1117 is 'pin compatible with other three-terminal SCSI regulators' including the onsemi NCP1117 family. Lowest cost 1117-family alternative.
replacementCandidates.productOverview: AMS1117-2.5 is Advanced Monolithic Systems' 1.0 A low-dropout positive fixed 2.5 V voltage regulator in SOT-223. Maximum dropout 1.3 V at 1.0 A, 15 V max input, ±2% output tolerance. The AMS1117 is the original 1117-family pinout (pin 1=Adj/GND, pin 2=Vout, pin 3=Vin, tab=Vin) and is pin-for-pin footprint-compatible with onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G (2.5 V fixed, 1.0 A, SOT-223). Lowest cost 1117-family alternative. Documented as 'pin compatible with other three-terminal SCSI regulators' in AMS datasheet.
replacementCandidates.reason: Footprint- and pin-function-compatible P2P replacement for the onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G from Advanced Monolithic Systems. AMS1117-2.5 is the original 1117 family in SOT-223 with identical pinout (pin 1=Adj/GND, pin 2=Vout, pin 3=Vin, tab=Vin), 1.3 V max dropout at 1.0 A. Per AMS datasheet, the AMS1117 is 'pin compatible with other three-terminal SCSI regulators' including the onsemi NCP1117 family. Lowest cost 1117-family alternative.

fitNotes: Footprint- and pin-function-compatible P2P replacement for the onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G (2.5 V fixed, 1.0 A LDO, SOT-223). Diodes AP1117-25 is the industry-standard 1117 family variant with the same SOT-223 pinout (pin 1=Adj/GND, pin 2=Vout, pin 3=Vin, tab=Vin), 1.3 V max dropout at 1.0 A, ±2% tolerance. Direct drop-in for designs migrating from the onsemi NCP1117 family after onsemi's 1Q2021 PDN (Last Ship 2025-04-08).
replacementCandidates.productOverview: AP1117-25 is Diodes Incorporated's 1.0 A low-dropout positive fixed 2.5 V voltage regulator in SOT-223 (K suffix). Maximum dropout 1.3 V at 1.0 A, 18 V max input, ±2% output tolerance. Industry-standard 1117 family pinout (pin 1=Adj/GND, pin 2=Vout, pin 3=Vin, tab=Vin). Pin-for-pin footprint- and pin-function-compatible with onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G (2.5 V fixed, 1.0 A, SOT-223). Standard '1117 family' alternative recommended after onsemi's 1Q2021 PDN (Last Ship 2025-04-08).
replacementCandidates.reason: Footprint- and pin-function-compatible P2P replacement for the onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G (2.5 V fixed, 1.0 A LDO, SOT-223). Direct drop-in for designs migrating from the onsemi NCP1117 family after onsemi's 1Q2021 PDN (Last Ship 2025-04-08).

replacementCandidates.description: 1.0 A low-dropout positive fixed 2.5 V voltage regulator, SOT-223. Footprint and pin-function compatible with onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G.
fitNotes: Footprint- and pin-function-compatible P2P replacement for the onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G (2.5 V fixed, 1.0 A LDO, SOT-223). Same SOT-223 pinout (pin 1=Adj/GND, pin 2=Vout, pin 3=Vin, tab=Vin). TLV1117LV drops 455 mV at 1.0 A versus 1.2 V for NCP1117, and quiescent current is 100 uA versus 5 mA. onsemi published 1Q2021 PDN for the NCP1117 family with Last Time Buy 2024-10-08 and Last Ship Date 2025-04-08. TLV1117LV is the recommended P2P migration target per TI cross-reference documentation.
replacementCandidates.productOverview: TLV1117LV25DCYR is TI's 1.0 A LDO fixed 2.5 V in SOT-223 (DCY package), part of TLV1117LV family. Maximum dropout 455 mV at 1.0 A, 6 V max input, ±1.5% output tolerance. Footprint- and pin-function-compatible with onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G (same SOT-223 pinout: pin 1=Adj/GND, pin 2=Vout, pin 3=Vin, tab=Vin). Lower quiescent current than NCP1117 (100 uA vs 5 mA). Recommended as direct P2P drop-in for designs migrating from NCP1117 family after onsemi's 1Q2021 PDN (Last Ship 2025-04-08).
replacementCandidates.reason: Footprint- and pin-function-compatible P2P replacement for the onsemi NCP1117ST25T3G (2.5 V fixed, 1.0 A LDO, SOT-223). Same SOT-223 pinout (pin 1=Adj/GND, pin 2=Vout, pin 3=Vin, tab=Vin). TLV1117LV drops 455 mV at 1.0 A versus 1.2 V for NCP1117, and quiescent current is 100 uA versus 5 mA. onsemi published 1Q2021 PDN for the NCP1117 family with Last Time Buy 2024-10-08 and Last Ship Date 2025-04-08. TLV1117LV is the recommended P2P migration target per TI cross-reference documentation.

target.productOverview:
1.0 A Low-Dropout Positive Fixed and Adjustable Voltage Regulators
The NCP1117 series are low dropout positive voltage regulators that are capable of providing an output current that is in excess of 1.0 A with a maximum dropout voltage of 1.2 V at 800 mA over temperature. This series contains eight fixed output voltages of 1.5 V, 1.8 V, 2.0 V, 2.5 V, 2.85 V, 3.3 V, 5.0 V, and 12 V that have no minimum load requirement to maintain regulation. Also included is an adjustable output version that can be programmed from 1.25 V to 18.8 V with two external resistors. On chip trimming adjusts the reference/output voltage to within ±1.0% accuracy. Internal protection features consist of output current limiting, safe operating area compensation, and thermal shutdown.
The NCP1117 series can operate with up to 20 V input. Devices are available in SOT−223 and DPAK packages.
Features
• Output Current in Excess of 1.0 A
• 1.2 V Maximum Dropout Voltage at 800 mA Over Temperature
• Fixed Output Voltages of 1.5 V, 1.8 V, 2.0 V, 2.5 V, 2.85 V, 3.3 V, 5.0 V, and 12 V
• Adjustable Output Voltage Option
• No Minimum Load Requirement for Fixed Voltage Output Devices
• Reference/Output Voltage Trimmed to ±1.0%
• Current Limit, Safe Operating and
Thermal Shutdown Protection
• Operation to 20 V Input
• NCV Prefix for Automotive and Other Applications Requiring Site and Control Changes
• Pb−Free Packages are AvailableApplications
• Consumer and Industrial Equipment Point of Regulation
• Active SCSI Termination for 2.85 V Version
• Switching Power Supply Post Regulation
• Hard Drive Controllers
• Battery Chargers
